sys_script_fix.description:
NOTE: update in 2.8.4 | 2023-11-06 | STRY0146507 - Certification Failed Test Results - Provided the updates required to keep in product Flag Org Unit Duplication
Release Introduced: 2.5 - This can be run to Rename duplicate Organizational Unites. - This script does not need to be run unless duplicate names are found
Purpose: - Find all Organizational Units with duplicate Organizational Unit names and Abbreviation combinations and renames them to make sure all names and abr are unique - ServiceNow does not permist scoped apps to declare unique indexes. - As a result some duplicate names were created before a bug was fixed. - This script makes all names unique
Validation: - After running open list of all Organizational Units x_153465_discovert_discover_office_hierarchy_list.do - Order by Name and Abbreviation - If any consecutive Organizational units have the same Name and Abbreviation, this script didn't correct all issues - This script creates an email listing all Organizational Units changed by the script - Nothing is written to the log while this is running, but the count of updated records will be displayed when complete
If any Errors occurs while processing OUs, the error will be written to the log in this format: Log Level - Error Message - "OU Name:[ouName] - - Error in 'Flag Org Unit Duplication' - exception: " + error
If an error occurs sending the associated notification to users Log Level - Error Message - "Error in 'Flag Org Unit Duplication' - Sending email listing exceptions - exception: " + error
This Fix Script will reset any duplicate Organizational Unit Name and Abbreviation combinatios.
sys_script_fix.name: Flag Org Unit Duplication
